title: mammillaria neopalmeri
intro: Mammillaria neopalmeri is a species of cactus, belonging to the family Cactaceae, characterized by its small, globular stems with short, white spines. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mammillaria neopalmeri are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and crushing the stems, which can be used as a tea or infused into oils for topical application.
